onwer_help_description:
Hello! **I'm Brix**, your fox companion, ready to make your **community experience even more fun and practical**, kyu~!

I have a variety of useful commands, from **administrative tools** for the team to pure entertainment. With me, you can create memes, explore Braixen images, set birthday reminders, receive Bump alerts, and **much more!**

All my commands are accessible through the **slash command menu in Discord**, just look them up and start using them, kyu~!

Oh, and I also have some **non-slash commands**. There aren't many, but they're quite useful. Just type **-help** to see which ones are available. A little hint: some of them are for my developer, so don't try using them, okay?

And there's more! Every now and then, I pop up out of nowhere when someone mentions a magic word... like 'kyu'. I'm here to give your **community** a **unique personality** worthy of what a Braixen can offer ~kyuu!

Finally, if you ever need someone to talk to, just mention me and say something! I use the amazing Character.ai API (only in Portuguese) to chat with you in a special way, kyu~!
onwer_botinfo_author: Kyuuu! Hello, I'm {}! Nice to meet you~!
onwer_botinfo_footer: A little Braixen created with lots of love... and a pinch of stubbornness ~kyuu!

cargo_temporario_help:
### 🦊┃ Help with Temporary Roles

Hey, fox! Want to know how temporary roles work, Kyu? It's pretty simple! Imagine you need to assign a role to someone for a specific task and remove it after some time. Well, I can take care of that for you, Kyu! Just tell me the **user**, the **role** to assign, and the **duration**. When the time is up, I'll automatically remove the role. Easy, right? Kyu~

botão_duvida_loja:
## Help with Daily Shop
<:Braix:1272653348306419824>┃ This is my **daily shop**, kyu! Here you can acquire amazing customizations for your **/profile view**, using <:BraixenCoin:1272655353108103220> **BraixenCoin** or <:Graveto:1318962131567378432> **twigs**. The available items have different rarities and prices, and some can only be purchased with <:Graveto:1318962131567378432> **twigs**, so choose wisely, kyu!

### Rarity Types
**Common:** Basic items with few details but still charming.
**Rare:** More refined artwork, with different icons, colored fonts, and even special filters.
**Epic:** Artwork with impeccable finishing, impressive filters, and exclusive icons, all in harmony to create something memorable.
**Exclusive:** Similar to the epic level, but they are unique artworks that only appear in special events, kyu~!

message_8ball: Yes, ~kyu! The stars are in your favor today, kyu!
No, ~kyu... it looks like the flames of luck aren't shining for you right now, ~kyu.
Yes, ~kyu! The path ahead is full of possibilities, kyu!
No, kyu... it seems the flames of the answer are a bit weak right now, kyu.
Yes, ~kyu! Focus on your goals and you will achieve success, kyu!
No, ~kyu... the flames indicate there may be challenges ahead, ~kyu.
Yes, ~kyu! Your determination will be rewarded, kyu!
No, ~kyu... maybe it's best to reconsider your approach, kyu.
Yes, ~kyu! Luck is on your side, take advantage of the opportunities, kyu!
No, ~kyu... the flames reveal that it's best to be cautious at this moment, kyu.
The flames are waiting to manifest. Ask me again later, and we'll see what fate has in store, kyu.
~Kyuu, the flames of the answer are a bit dim, ~kyu. Not exactly an exciting surprise, is it?
Luck is on your side... or not. Frankly, the flames are being indecisive today, ~kyu.
Uncertainty lingers in the air, ~kyu. It might be wise to wait for a clearer moment before proceeding.
I'm not in the mood to read the flames of the answer today, ~kyu. Come back when I'm less busy being awesome.
The flames are undecided, ~kyu. The choice may be up to you.
The flames don't have a definitive answer, ~kyu. Maybe fate is still forming.
Hmm, ~kyu... do you really think the flames would reveal something so obvious? Come back when you ask a better question.
The flames? They don't have time for this today, ~kyu. Sorry, or maybe not.
Hmm, ~kyu... the flames are too impatient for such common questions. Come back when it's something more interesting.

message_help_rep:
### <:badge_rep:1345111116803608616>┃ How does the Reputation System work?

Hey fox! Kyuuu~ Did you know I have an internal reputation system? It lets you earn recognition for your good actions in the community! <:Braix_Heart2:1287443199337693184>

Whenever someone helps you, answers your questions, or does something nice, you can thank them by giving them a reputation <:badge_rep:1345111116803608616>. And the best part: it gets recorded on their profile, showing how much they contribute to the community! <:badge_rep:1345111116803608616>

Want to become a prestigious fox? Start spreading good reputations now, kyuuu! 🔥

message_boasvindas_dica:
<:Braix_You:1272670440652935289>┃ Fox tip! You can use variables (placeholders) to personalize your community messages, Kyu!
- **@user** mentions the user.
- **guild** displays the community's name.
- **guildsize** shows how many members we have.
- **userid** displays the user's ID.

You can also mention roles or even format variables with bold, italic, etc., kyu!

Example usage: Hello, @user! Welcome to the guild! Currently, we have guildsize members!

Note: You need permission to manage the community to set this up!

And as a good Braixen, I know all of them and will remind you about them every day. I use an [online calendar](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/embed?src=j5gnr9l1o867fke2cocmjieaa8@group.calendar.google.com&ctz=America/Sao_Paulo) with all the dates and respective Pokémon, but sometimes there might not be one on a certain day, and other days might have three Pokémon at once, go figure ~kyuu.

onwer_botinfo_description:
I was created by <@197071176810364928> with a grand purpose: to be the **best Braixen bot** and, of course, your friend<:Braix_Heart2:1287443199337693184>! ~kyuu 

I was **programmed** in [discord python](https://discordpy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/) following the [Cogs](https://discordpy.readthedocs.io/en/stable/ext/commands/cogs.html) *coding pattern*. I stay **online and operational** thanks to [Squarecloud](https://squarecloud.app/). Want to know more about my current status? Use </brix status:1345864402846482484> and check out all the details!

I am a **feature-rich** bot, so impressive that I could almost pass for a **real Braixen**! (But don't worry, I'm not throwing embers yet... or am I? ~kyuu 🔥👀)

All my commands are in **slash (/)**, so just look for me in your command list and explore everything I can do!

Currently, I am part of **{} communities**, interacting with a total of **{} members**! 

Oh, and don't forget to<:Braix:1272653348306419824> c<:Braix_UlikeKissingBraixens:1272665955142598798>heck out my [terms of use](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1sknHLpFqJZRbWG8sJHi3C-yc5yXqwmaaXOTSWxTCjKw/edit?tab=t.0) and visit my new [website](https://brix.squareweb.app/), okay? ~kyu!
